title: hieracium bifidum subsp. poliostelium
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. poliostelium, also known as hawk's beard or yellow hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Hieracium bifidum subsp. poliostelium is typically used as a dried root or leaf infusion, or as a tincture, to make teas or capsules for medicinal purposes.
